prompt:
Goal: Create an ultra-detailed vertical cyberpunk architectural anime illustration of an unfinished giant girl embedded inside a futuristic megastructure construction site, with the mood of “unfinished girl.”

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster composition, dense full-frame illustration, white paper background with fine black ink linework and watercolor-like color accents. Bottom-right has a small handwritten date and signature reading “May 29, 2026” and “Oyagi.”

Main subject: Show exactly 1 colossal anime girl at the center, partially constructed or partially hidden by surrounding architecture. She has dark black hair with teal-green streaks, short messy hair falling across her neck, pale skin, and a loose white draped garment over her shoulders and torso. Her head and upper body are integrated into the city-scale scaffolding, making her look like a giant incomplete statue or living building. Place exactly 1 opaque square censor/placeholder block over her face, centered in the upper middle of the image; the block is a muted gray-brown gradient rectangle with sharp edges and no text.

Environment: A hyper-complex futuristic construction city packed with white modular towers, exposed steel scaffolding, catwalks, staircases, ladders, cranes, maintenance decks, capsule rooms, glass elevators, gantries, railings, tiny workers, and industrial platforms. The architecture should feel like a cross between a high-tech refinery, a modular space station, and a dense Japanese construction-site city.

Counted prominent elements: Include exactly 1 central giant girl, exactly 1 face-covering square block, exactly 4 dominant crane/gantry arms crossing the composition, exactly 5 large bright magenta industrial pipe runs, exactly 3 large transparent capsule/elevator pods, exactly 1 yellow circular tunnel ring in the lower-left center, and exactly 1 small rooftop house-like module with a yellow-and-white roof in the lower-right foreground. Add numerous smaller pipes, decks, miniature workers, and structural details as background texture, but keep the listed prominent elements visually readable.

Color palette: Mostly white and black technical drawing lines with vivid accent colors: hot magenta pipes, cyan and teal tubes, yellow railings and modules, orange crane beams, green structural braces, small blue panels, and occasional red details. Keep the girl's clothing mostly white so she blends into the architecture.

Style: Extremely intricate hand-drawn anime architectural concept art, fine ink outlines, meticulous perspective, dense mechanical detail, crisp line art, subtle watercolor wash, high-resolution poster illustration, inspired by futuristic Japanese sci-fi cityscapes and construction diagrams. No photorealism, no 3D render look.

Composition: The girl’s torso occupies the center-left to center area, surrounded and overlapped by platforms and pipes. The upper half is crowded with towers and scaffolding. The lower foreground contains walkways, railings, capsule structures, and tiny people for scale. Use strong vertical depth and layered perspective so the city feels enormous and crowded.

Constraints: No large readable headline text, no extra logos, no UI, no border. Keep the face block intentionally blank and opaque. Maintain the “unfinished construction” feeling and make the image overwhelmingly detailed.
